note: These areas span multiple divisions. When a process spans multiple divisions, name all relevant divisions and confirm with the user which one owns the process before proceeding.

areas.name: Customer Service and Registration Operations
areas.context: Program Support Supervisor in Administration coordinates registration and customer service operations at the department level. Individual divisions operate their own front-desk and registration functions.

areas.name: Incident and Emergency Response
areas.context: Emergency response procedures exist at the facility and program level across all divisions. Risk management notification requirements apply department-wide.
cross_cutting_processes: Risk management notification [VERIFY BEFORE PUBLISHING — confirm City Risk Management reporting thresholds and timelines]
areas.format_note: Incident response procedures are Format Type 2 (Decision-Support). Notification language and approved text are Format Type 4 (Communication Protocol).

areas.name: Equity and Inclusion Programming
areas.context: Equitable access is a stated guiding principle across every division. The Recreation Fund, Senior Assistance Fund, Eat Fresh Program, Financial Assistance Program, and ADA Access and Inclusion Team all serve this function.
cross_cutting_processes: Demographic data collection and reporting [VERIFY BEFORE PUBLISHING — confirm any City policy on participant data collection]
